entry.title: 对接文档
entry.content:
对接

接口

@RequestMapping(“/business/hotel”)

@GetMapping(“/list”)

参数
private String roomNumber; 房间号
返回值
/**
 * 酒店客房ID
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "酒店客房ID")
private Long roomId;

/**
 * 酒店ID
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "酒店ID")
private Long hotelId;

/**
 * 酒店客房号
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "酒店客房号")
private String roomNumber;

/**
 * 最大可住人数
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "最大可住人数")
private Long maxNum;

/**
 * 已入住人数
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "已入住人数")
private Long alredayNum;

/**
 * 剩余可入住人数
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "剩余可入住人数")
private Long sapreNum;

/**
 * 备注
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "备注")
private String remark;


/**
 * 房间入住人员详情
 */
private List<HotelRoomHisVo> hotelRoomHisVos;

hotelRoomHisVos

/**
 * 入住人员姓名
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "入住人员姓名")
private String person;

/**
 * 入住人身份证号
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "入住人身份证号")
private String stayPeopleIdcard;

接口

@RequestMapping(“/business/hotelRoomHis”)

@SaCheckPermission(“business:hotelRoomHis:list”)
@GetMapping(“/list”)

参数

/**
 * 酒店客房号
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "酒店客房号")
private String roomNumber;
/**
 * 入住人员姓名
 */
private String person;

/**
 * 入住人身份证号
 */
private String stayPeopleIdcard;

返回值

/**
 * 酒店客房ID
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "酒店客房ID")
private Long roomHisId;

/**
 * 酒店ID
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "酒店ID")
private Long hotelId;

/**
 * 酒店客房ID
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "酒店客房ID")
private Long roomId;

/**
 * 酒店客房号
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "酒店客房号")
private String roomNumber;

/**
 * 入住人员标识
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "入住人员标识")
private Long personId;

/**
 * 入住人员姓名
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "入住人员姓名")
private String person;

/**
 * 入住人身份证号
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "入住人身份证号")
private String stayPeopleIdcard;

/**
 * 入住日期
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "入住日期")
private Date checkInTime;

/**
 * 入住人员来自哪里
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "入住人员来自哪里")
private String personFrom;

/**
 * 执勤点标识
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "执勤点标识")
private Long dutyPointId;

/**
 * 执勤点名称
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "执勤点名称")
private String dutyPointName;

/**
 * 备注
 */
@ExcelProperty(value = "备注")
private String remark;

同上房间信息

同入住登记房间信息

地址

@RequestMapping(“/business/hotelRoomHis”)

@SaCheckPermission(“business:hotelRoomHis:list”)
@GetMapping(“/roomInfo”)

参数

@RequestParam("roomHisId") Long roomHisId； 入住详情id

返回值

/**
 * 房间号
 */
private String roomNumber;

/**
 * 已住人数
 */
private Long alredayNum;

/**
 * 可住人数
 */
private Integer maxNum;

/**
 * 人员电话
 */
private String personName;

/**
 * 身份证号
 */
private String idCard;

/**
 * 人员手机号
 */
private String phoneNumber;

/**
 *站点名称
 */
private String dutyPointName;

/**
 * 站点负责人姓名
 */
private String directorName;

/**
 * 负责人手机号
 */
private String directorPhoneNumber;

同上房间信息

@RequestMapping(“/business/hotelRoomHis”)

@SaCheckPermission(“business:hotelRoomHis:add”)
@PostMapping()

参数


/**
 * 酒店ID
 */
@NotNull(message = "酒店ID不能为空", groups = { EditGroup.class })
private Long hotelId;

/**
 * 酒店客房ID
 */
@NotNull(message = "酒店客房ID不能为空", groups = { EditGroup.class })
private Long roomId;

/**
 * 酒店客房号
 */
@NotBlank(message = "酒店客房号不能为空", groups = { AddGroup.class, EditGroup.class })
private String roomNumber;

/**
 * 入住人员标识
 */
@NotNull(message = "入住人员标识不能为空", groups = { AddGroup.class, EditGroup.class })
private Long personId;

/**
 * 入住人员姓名
 */
@NotBlank(message = "入住人员姓名不能为空", groups = { AddGroup.class, EditGroup.class })
private String person;

/**
 * 入住人身份证号
 */
@NotBlank(message = "入住人身份证号不能为空", groups = { AddGroup.class, EditGroup.class })
private String stayPeopleIdcard;

/**
 * 入住日期
 */
private Date checkInTime;

/**
 * 入住状态
 */
private String checkInStatusnd;

/**
 * 入住人员来自哪里
 */
@NotBlank(message = "入住人员来自哪里不能为空", groups = { AddGroup.class, EditGroup.class })
private String personFrom;

/**
 * 执勤点标识
 */
@NotNull(message = "执勤点标识不能为空", groups = { AddGroup.class, EditGroup.class })
private Long dutyPointId;

/**
 * 执勤点名称
 */
@NotBlank(message = "执勤点名称不能为空", groups = { AddGroup.class, EditGroup.class })
private String dutyPointName;

/**
 * 备注
 */
private String remark;
